name: Labour Contract Validate
script:
total_hours = 0
total_wage = 0
for row in doc.attendance:
    if row.hours_worked and row.pay_rate:
        row.total_pay = row.hours_worked * row.pay_rate
    else:
        row.total_pay = 0
    total_hours += (row.hours_worked or 0)
    total_wage += (row.total_pay or 0)
doc.total_hours = total_hours
doc.total_wage_bill = total_wage

name: Make Labour Contract JE
Daily Log Stock Issue
Equipment Log Validate
Equipment Log Fuel Issue
script:
if doc.fuel_item and doc.fuel_consumed:
    warehouse = frappe.db.get_single_value("Agriculture Settings", "fuel_warehouse") or "Stores - CP"
    project = frappe.db.get_value("Crop Cycle", doc.crop_cycle, "project")

    se = frappe.get_doc({
        "doctype": "Stock Entry",
        "stock_entry_type": "Material Issue",
        "company": frappe.db.get_default("company"),
        "items": [{
            "item_code": doc.fuel_item,
            "qty": doc.fuel_consumed,
            "s_warehouse": warehouse,
            "project": project
        }]
    })
    se.insert()
    se.submit()
    doc.db_set("stock_entry", se.name)

name: Harvest Recording Receipt
script:
if doc.create_stock_entry:
    crop_name = frappe.db.get_value("Crop Cycle", doc.crop_cycle, "crop")

    # Get item from Crop's produce child table
    item_code = None
    produce = frappe.get_all("BOM Item", filters={"parent": crop_name, "parentfield": "produce"}, fields=["item_code"], limit=1)
    if produce:
        item_code = produce[0].item_code

    if not item_code:
        frappe.throw("No Item linked to Crop " + str(crop_name) + ". Cannot create Stock Entry.")

    se = frappe.get_doc({
        "doctype": "Stock Entry",
        "stock_entry_type": "Material Receipt",
        "company": frappe.db.get_default("company"),
        "to_warehouse": doc.target_warehouse,
        "items": [{
            "item_code": item_code,
            "qty": doc.yield_quantity,
            "uom": doc.uom,
            "t_warehouse": doc.target_warehouse,
            "basic_rate": 0,
            "allow_zero_valuation_rate": 1
        }]
    })
    se.insert()
    se.submit()
    doc.db_set("stock_entry", se.name)

name: Crop Cycle Sync Cost Center
script:
if doc.project and doc.cost_centre:
    frappe.db.set_value("Project", doc.project, "cost_center", doc.cost_centre)

name: Get Crop Cycle PnL
script:
crop_cycle = frappe.form_dict.get("crop_cycle")
doc = frappe.get_doc("Crop Cycle", crop_cycle)

if not doc.project:
    frappe.response["message"] = {"revenue": 0, "cost": 0, "profit": 0}
else:
    revenue = frappe.db.get_value(
        "Sales Invoice Item",
        {"project": doc.project, "docstatus": 1},
        "sum(base_net_amount)"
    ) or 0

    stock_costs = frappe.db.get_value(
        "Stock Entry Detail",
        {"project": doc.project, "docstatus": 1, "t_warehouse": ["is", "not set"]},
        "sum(amount)"
    ) or 0

    equipment_hours = frappe.db.get_value(
        "Equipment Log",
        {"crop_cycle": doc.name, "docstatus": 1},
        "sum(hours)"
    ) or 0

    hourly_rate = frappe.db.get_single_value("Agriculture Settings", "equipment_hourly_rate") or 100
    equipment_cost = equipment_hours * hourly_rate

    labour_cost = frappe.db.get_value(
        "Labour Contract",
        {"crop_cycle": doc.name},
        "sum(total_wage_bill)"
    ) or 0

    total_cost = stock_costs + equipment_cost + labour_cost

    frappe.response["message"] = {
        "revenue": float(revenue),
        "cost": float(total_cost),
        "profit": float(revenue - total_cost),
        "currency": frappe.db.get_default("currency")
    }

name: Daily Agricultural Alerts
